miscTables.descr: Tax GLSU
Version
Company Code
pivot
Ledger Group
Account
Display Amt
G:J
Q
Ledger,Co,Flex6,PK,GL,GLdesc,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4,Txt,PC,TTY,PTF,Contract,TP,SubProd
Ledger,Co,DocNbr,PK,GL,GLdesc,Display Amt,Doc Amt,LC Amt,LC2 Amt,Txt,PC,TTY,PTF,Contract,TP,Sub Producer
Ledger,Co,GL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and  '[version]' = 'ODY IFRS 4' and not (Ledger in ('IF','UG') and Co < '5001')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and  '[version]' = 'ODY IFRS 17' and not (Ledger = 'IF' and Co like '599%')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and  '[version]' = 'ORB IFRS 4 LG' and not (Ledger = 'LG' and Co = '2210')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and  '[version]' = 'CAD IFRS 17 LG' and not (Ledger = 'LG' and Co in ('2006','9006'))
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and  '[version]' = 'HUDCAD IFRS 17 LG' and not (Ledger = 'LG' and Co in ('2310','9231'))
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and  '[version]' = '(none)'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt3 = 0 or Amt4 = 0)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL >= '3400000' and GL < '3600000' and not substring(GL,6,2) in ('01','02','04','05')

update TransX set GL = '9999999' from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on substring(GL,1,5) = ID where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL >= '3400000' and GL < '3600000' and Table_ID = 'Tax GL' and Descr = '9999999'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '9999999'
update TransX set TP = '', Contract = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,5) <> '35840'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '3545502'
update TransX set Amt3 = -Amt3 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL >= '3400000' and GL < '3600000' and substring(GL,6,2) in ('04','05') and not Amt3 is NULL
update TransX set Amt4 = -Amt4 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL >= '3400000' and GL < '3600000' and substring(GL,6,2) in ('04','05') and not Amt4 is NULL
update TransX set Amt3 = -Amt3*0.21 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL >= '3400000' and GL < '3600000' and substring(GL,6,2) in ('01','02') and not Amt3 is NULL
update TransX set Amt4 = -Amt4*0.21 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL >= '3400000' and GL < '3600000' and substring(GL,6,2) in ('01','02') and not Amt4 is NULL
update TransX set GL = substring(GL,1,5) + '04' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL >= '3400000' and GL < '3600000' and GL like '%01'
update TransX set GL = substring(GL,1,5) + '05' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL >= '3400000' and GL < '3600000' and GL like '%02'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, TP, Contract, Amt3, Flex6) (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL,TP, Contract, round(sum(Amt3),0) as Amt3, 'consolidate' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Amt3 is NULL group by KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, TP, Contract)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, TP, Contract, Amt4, Flex6) (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL,TP, Contract, round(sum(Amt4),0) as Amt4, 'consolidate' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Amt4 is NULL group by KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, TP, Contract)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex6 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt3 = 0 or Amt4 = 0

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, TP, Contract, Amt3, Amt4, PK) (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL,TP, Contract, round(sum(coalesce(Amt3,0)),0) as Amt3, round(sum(coalesce(Amt4,0)),0) as Amt4,  '40' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt3 > 0 or Amt4 > 0) and PK is NULL group by KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, TP, Contract)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, TP, Contract, Amt3, Amt4, PK) (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL,TP, Contract, round(sum(coalesce(Amt3,0)),0) as Amt3, round(sum(coalesce(Amt4,0)),0) as Amt4,  '50' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt3 < 0 or Amt4 < 0) and PK is NULL group by KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, TP, Contract)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt3 = 0 and Amt4 = 0
update TransX set Flex5 = m.Descr from TransX inner join Misc_Tables m on substring(GL,1,5) = m.ID where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m.Table_ID = 'Tax GL'
update TransX set Flex5 = '1720005' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '34%' and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '1720015' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '359%' and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '1720013' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '35%' and Flex5 is NULL

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, TP, Contract, Amt3,Amt4, PK,Flex6) (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, Flex5 as GL,TP, Contract, Amt3, Amt4, PK,'3610001' as Flex6 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '50' and not Flex5 is NULL and GL like '%04')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, TP, Contract, Amt3,Amt4, PK,Flex6) (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, Flex5 as GL,TP, Contract, Amt3, Amt4, PK,'3610001' as Flex6 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '40' and not Flex5 is NULL and GL like '%04' and not coalesce(Flex6,'') = '3610001')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, TP, Contract, Amt3,Amt4, PK,Flex6) (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, '3610001' as GL,TP, Contract, -Amt3 as Amt3, -Amt4 as Amt4, '40' as PK,'3610001' as Flex6 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '50' and not Flex5 is NULL and GL like '%04' and not coalesce(Flex6,'') = '3610001')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, TP, Contract, Amt3,Amt4, PK,Flex6) (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, '3610001' as GL,TP, Contract, -Amt3 as Amt3, -Amt4 as Amt4, '50' as PK,'3610001' as Flex6 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '40' and not Flex5 is NULL and GL like '%04' and not coalesce(Flex6,'') = '3610001')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, TP, Contract, Amt3,Amt4, PK) (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, Flex5 as GL,TP, Contract, -Amt3 as Amt3, -Amt4 as Amt4, '40' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '50' and not Flex5 is NULL and not coalesce(Flex6,'') = '3610001')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, TP, Contract, Amt3,Amt4, PK) (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, Flex5 as GL,TP, Contract, -Amt3 as Amt3, -Amt4 as Amt4, '50' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '40' and not Flex5 is NULL and not coalesce(Flex6,'') = '3610001')
update TransX set Txt = 'Tax', Flex6 = '', Amt1 = Amt4, Amt2 = abs(Amt4), Amt3 = abs(Amt3), Amt4 = abs(Amt4) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set TTY = '704' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '172%'
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set PC = c.DefaultPC from TransX t inner join Companies c on t.Co = c.Co where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set PTF = 'PTF' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co in ('3030','3050')
update TransX set SubProd = 'TX' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring('[version]',6,2) = '17'
